evidence: "A great comedy with two great actors at the top of their game."
"One of the best war flicks ever."
"The obtuse nature of how the story unfolds is part of that atmosphere."
"This is how a B movie becomes an A movie."
"A great old fashioned flick with 3D to boot. Lots of extras."
"It's a gorgeous transfer, and a must for anyone who considers themselves a cinephile."
"The transfer has some problems with bright washouts and halos, and some harsh edge enhancement."
"The Blu ray is well done and looks great in its 2.35:1 Scope ratio."
"I remember taking note of the director Peter Chelsom."
"Kasdan is one of our best screenwriters, and this was his calling card."
"You ease into it like a warm bath, and soak up the vibes and frequencies it gives off..."
"The images are meticulously crafted, so treat yourself and see the Blu ray."
"It's just a nice piece of filmmaking and storytelling that sadly, we rarely get anymore."
"It really is about friendship and time, and how those things ebb and flow."

summary: The user enjoys a mix of comedy, drama, and sci-fi, with a strong appreciation for quality production and sensory experiences. They value emotional storytelling and have a moderate loyalty to specific creators, indicating a well-rounded taste in films.
